channel.title: ttsc Blog
channel.description: Engineering notes, releases, and deep dives from ttsc.

item.title: I Made TS Compiler Graph MCP: 10x Fewer Tokens in Claude Code
item.description: Built on the TypeScript compiler's own APIs, it reads the graph the compiler already resolved instead of guessing at it, so it stays exact and cuts tokens about 10x even on...

item.title: 800x Faster TypeScript Lint: I Moved Lint Into TypeScript-Go
item.description: @ttsc/lint moves lint into the TypeScript-Go-backed check path and ships a separate native format command: 800x faster lint and 70x faster format on the VS Code fixture.
